key.name: gaps-enabled
key.description: Add gaps around maximized and tiled windows.

key.name: gap-size
key.description: The size of gaps around tiled and maximized windows.

key.name: animation-delay
key.description: Time to wait for GNOME's tiling animation before applying gaps.

key.name: corners-enabled
key.description: Force rounded corners on all windows including Chrome, Firefox, etc.

key.name: corner-radius
key.description: The border radius applied to window corners.

key.name: topbar-enabled
key.description: Make the top bar transparent with pill-shaped indicators. Customize via stylesheet.css.
